release_notes: Environment-aware version resolution, mobile sidebar auto-close with backdrop, and changelog UI hardening.

changes.note: Rewrote _get_version() with environment-aware resolution for frozen/source/pip branches.
Added mobile sidebar auto-close helpers and backdrop toggle logic.
Auto-close sidebar on modal open; removed hardcoded version fallback in changelog UI.
Close sidebar on mobile after session load.
Added sidebar backdrop styles and mobile width/z-index overrides.
Added base hidden rule for sidebar-backdrop on desktop.
Release job now attaches root update_manifest.json instead of internal copy.
Added regression tests for all version resolution branches.
